data.title: Duty of disclosure: Transactions in shares in Ringkjøbing Landbobank A/S
data.description: Various stock exchanges including Nasdaq Copenhagen, London Stock Exchange, and Euronext Dublin have agreed to collaborate with the Danish Financial Supervisory Authority and other stakeholders. This partnership aims to enhance financial oversight and regulatory measures in the market. The collaboration involves sharing information and resources to strengthen compliance efforts. This move is expected to foster better transparency and integrity within the financial sector.

data.title: Entergy Texas declares quarterly dividend on preferred stock
data.description: In The Woodlands, Texas, the board of directors at Entergy Texas, Inc. announced a quarterly dividend of $0.3359375 per share on its Series A Preferred Stock. This dividend will be paid out on April 15, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of April 3, 2026.

data.title: Strategy Could Own 1 Million Bitcoin By September—Here's The Math
data.description: Strategy, traded as NASDAQ: MSTR, is projected to reach a total of 1 million Bitcoin, symbolized as CRYPTO: BTC, by September 2026 if it maintains its historical 16% quarterly acquisition rate. The company's preferred stock, STRC, allows for acquisitions during market downturns unlike in previous cycles. Strategy, under the leadership of Michael Saylor, has consistently increased its Bitcoin holdings by an average of 16% quarter-over-quarter since 2020. In Q1, they acquired 88,568 Bitcoin, the second-highest quarterly acquisition even with Bitcoin trading 45% below its peak. Currently, the company holds 761,068 Bitcoin as of March 18. Acquiring an additional 100,000 Bitcoin this quarter would boost their holdings to 860,000, positioning them a quarter away from reaching 1 million by September. Last week, Strategy raised $1.5 billion, with $1.18 billion coming from STRC preferred stock, in contrast to $396 million from common stock. This is the first instance of the company utilizing preferred stock as the primary funding source.

data.title: Fangzhou Reports Robust 2025 Financial Results, Boosted by AI Chronic Care Strategy
data.description: In the fiscal year of 2025, Fangzhou announced its annual financial performance, revealing impressive growth in revenue and successfully attaining profitability for the full year.

data.title: In HelloNation, Insurance Expert James Baker of Williamsburg, KY, Shares the Benefits of Bundling Insurance
data.description: In Williamsburg, Kentucky, a recent article published on March 19, 2026 discusses the advantages of combining home and auto insurance policies for families. The piece, written by HelloNation, highlights insights from Insurance Agent James Baker from Williamsburg. By bundling these insurance policies, families can better organize their coverage and enhance their protection. This approach not only simplifies the insurance process but also leads to potential cost savings. The article sheds light on why bundling insurance is beneficial and how families in Williamsburg, KY can benefit from this strategy to ensure their well-being.

data.title: Pfizer Combo Therapy Scores Major Win In Prostate Cancer Trial
data.description: Pfizer Inc.'s shares (NYSE: PFE) increased during Thursday's trading session after revealing data on Talzenna plus Xtandi's investigational treatment regimen for HRR gene-mutated metastatic castration-sensitive prostate cancer (mCSPC). The company announced topline data from the TALAPRO-3 Phase 3 study of Talzenna (talazoparib) combined with Xtandi (enzalutamide) for metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer. The study successfully achieved its primary endpoint, showing Talzenna plus Xtandi significantly improved radiographic progression-free survival (rPFS) compared to placebo plus Xtandi. The results surpassed the prespecified target hazard ratio of 0.63, with a majority of patients remaining progression-free. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
